name: Thai Chicken Fettuccine Salad
recipeIngredient: 3 Chicken breast halves - boneless, skinless - cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine picante sauce, peanut butter, honey, orange juice, soy sauce, and ginger in a small saucepan. Cook and stir over low heat until blended and smooth.
2. Reserve 1/4 cup of the sauce mixture.
3. Place fettuccine in a large bowl. Pour the remaining sauce over the fettuccine; toss gently to coat.
4. Cook chicken in oil in a skillet over medium-high heat until browned and cooked, about 5 minutes.
5. Add the reserved 1/4 cup of picante sauce mixture; mix well.
6. Arrange fettuccine over lettuce-lined platter.
7. Top with chicken mixture.
8. Sprinkle cilantro, peanut halves, and red pepper strips over top.
9. Refrigerate until cooled to room temperature.
10. Serve with additional picante sauce.
